title: ALLCPR Smart Manikin — SOP Library Audit
description: Machine-readable classification of every file in SOP_library for the ALLCPR Site Operations Agent. active_workflow = converted into an app workflow/checklist; reference_template = indexed/linked only; archive_only = kept in the library but not app-wired. No raw passcodes are stored here.

entries.reason: Travel apply/approve/execute/report/expense SOP (V1.0). Relevant only when staff travel (e.g. for a site visit), not for Smart Manikin site inspection.
entries.recommended_app_use: Source for a reference-only Business Trip Process workflow; deliberately NOT wired into the default staff inspection.

entries.filename: Smart Manikin ICPIS 合作分点开发与运营 SOP.docx
entries.path: SOP_library/01_Core_SOPs/Smart Manikin ICPIS 合作分点开发与运营 SOP.docx
entries.reason: Investor/partner (ICPIS) site development & operations SOP. Clarifies partner role boundaries.
entries.recommended_app_use: Reference for partner/operator responsibilities and what a partner may NOT promise; not needed in the default staff tool.

entries.filename: Smart Manikin New Market Expansion SOP.docx
entries.path: SOP_library/01_Core_SOPs/Smart Manikin New Market Expansion SOP.docx
entries.reason: Strategic market-expansion SOP (V1.0) — market-level, not site operations.
entries.recommended_app_use: Strategic reference (KPIs, risk mapping, escalation triggers) for future expansion planning; not an immediate staff workflow.

entries.filename: Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx
entries.path: SOP_library/01_Core_SOPs/Smart Manikin 专员分点巡检 SOP.docx
entries.reason: Official Site Representative weekly inspection SOP. This is the backbone of the guided staff inspection and is already extracted to smart_manikin_site_inspection_sop.json.
entries.recommended_app_use: Drives the Smart Manikin Full Site Inspection workflow: before photos, table/station pre-check, site checklist, on-site handling, after photos, Weekly Site Check Report, upload, do-not-repair rules.
entries.source_risk_notes: Page-3 equipment placement diagram is a visual reference only; source-backed labels used, no image analysis. No passcodes in this file.

entries.filename: Smart Manikins 新地点开发 SOP.docx
entries.path: SOP_library/01_Core_SOPs/Smart Manikins 新地点开发 SOP.docx
entries.reason: BD new-location development SOP (V1.1). Defines the end-to-end new-site workflow but is not part of weekly site inspection.
entries.recommended_app_use: Source for a future New Site Assessment workflow (BD field assessment, scoring, approval/escalation). Indexed, not wired into the default staff tool.
entries.source_risk_notes: References the scoring sheet and field form; no passcodes.

entries.reason: Bilingual weekly inspection record form referenced by the inspection SOP; its fields define the report step of the full inspection workflow.
entries.recommended_app_use: Report structure and completion checklist for the Weekly Site Check Report step (site result, problems found, actions taken, whether ALLCPR support needed).
entries.source_risk_notes: Blank form/template; no site-specific data or passcodes.

entries.filename: SMART MANIKIN SITE FIELD ASSESSMENT FORM.pdf
entries.path: SOP_library/02_Forms_and_Templates/SMART MANIKIN SITE FIELD ASSESSMENT FORM.pdf
entries.reason: PDF version of the site field assessment form (duplicate content of 现场考察表.docx).
entries.recommended_app_use: Printable field assessment form for the future New Site Assessment workflow.
entries.source_risk_notes: Scanned/exported form; not machine-parsed here; no passcodes.

entries.reason: Site field assessment form for evaluating a candidate new location; not a weekly-inspection artifact.
entries.recommended_app_use: Field assessment checklist for the future New Site Assessment workflow.

entries.reason: Official site-selection scoring workbook (8-dimension weighted model with decision bands).
entries.recommended_app_use: Scoring model reference for the future New Site Assessment workflow; not step-by-step staff logic.
entries.source_risk_notes: Contains candidate addresses as examples; no passcodes. Treat address data as internal.

entries.reason: Site signage template (v1.0) — a print asset, not a procedure.
entries.recommended_app_use: Signage asset the inspection references (signage-complete check); not converted to steps.

entries.filename: 新点审批 邮件申请模版.docx
entries.path: SOP_library/02_Forms_and_Templates/新点审批 邮件申请模版.docx
entries.reason: New-site approval email templates (site approval, virtual-course test result, expense approval).
entries.recommended_app_use: Source-backed draft templates for a future New Site Approval draft action; not an active staff workflow.

entries.reason: Attachment (附件1) to the Short Term Business Trip SOP: business trip request. A trip-process form, not a Smart Manikin site-inspection artifact.
entries.recommended_app_use: Form referenced by the reference-only Business Trip Process workflow; not wired into the default staff inspection.

entries.filename: Mileage Reimbursement Policy for ALLCPR Instructor.docx
entries.path: SOP_library/04_Policies/Mileage Reimbursement Policy for ALLCPR Instructor.docx
entries.reason: Reimbursement policy — financial reference, not operational site inspection.
entries.recommended_app_use: Reimbursement reference linked to the Business Trip Process; not an active site workflow.
entries.source_risk_notes: Policy figures may be estimates; no passcodes.

entries.reason: Generated English-only combined staff manual that consolidates the curated Smart Manikin SOP library into one professional DOCX deliverable.
entries.recommended_app_use: Human-facing master SOP reference; not consumed directly by the assistant runtime.
entries.source_risk_notes: Generated manual deliberately excludes site-specific access codes, Wi-Fi passwords, staff PINs, and private site-access details.

entries.reason: Markdown source used to build the generated English-only Master SOP DOCX.
entries.recommended_app_use: Maintainer-editable source for regenerating the human-facing Master SOP; not consumed directly by the assistant runtime.
entries.source_risk_notes: Generated source deliberately excludes site-specific access codes, Wi-Fi passwords, staff PINs, and private site-access details.

entries.reason: ALLCPR logo embedded in the generated Master SOP cover/header.
entries.recommended_app_use: Human-facing branding asset for the Master SOP; not consumed directly by the assistant runtime.

entries.reason: Generic equipment placement diagram embedded in the generated Master SOP as a layout reference.
entries.recommended_app_use: Human-facing visual support for the Master SOP; reference only, never repair instructions.
entries.source_risk_notes: Generic diagram; no site-specific access information or passcodes.

entries.source_risk_notes: Generic setup image; no site-specific access information or passcodes.

entries.reason: Generic app login/continue screen image embedded in the generated Master SOP.

entries.reason: Generic BLS session screenshot embedded in the generated Master SOP.

entries.reason: Human-readable companion to this audit (the audit summary itself), not an operational SOP.
entries.recommended_app_use: Human orientation for the SOP library audit; not consumed by the assistant.
